The Tremendous API allows businesses to send rewards, incentives, and payouts worldwide. Access 2000+ payout methods including gift cards, prepaid Visa/Mastercard, PayPal, Venmo, bank transfers, and charity donations. Supports multi-product rewards (recipient chooses from a catalog) and single-product rewards (fixed payout method). Authentication uses Bearer API key or OAuth 2.0.

Contact Support:
 Name: Tremendous Support
 Email: api@tremendous.com
